case_title: PAK J. WON VS. YAN XIA MA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2009 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUN-22-2009 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT REFUSED TO STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM OR COMMISSIONER. AT THE HEARING THE DEFENDANT STATED THAT SHE WOULD NOT APPEAR IF THE MATTER WAS NOT HEARD ON 5-18-09, DESPITE HER REFUSAL TO STIPULATE. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WON, PAK J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MA, YAN XIA A.K.A. YI  HAR MA $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,085.00, DEFENDANT TO PAY $6000.00 OR RETURN THE RING PURCHASHED BY PLAINTIFF ON DECEMBER 15, 2008. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-29-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for small claims appeal.

Appearances: Brian Y.K. Ching, Esq. on behalf of appellant Yan Xia Ma
Andrew Catterall, Esq. on behalf of respondent Pak J. Won

All parties and witnesses were sworn. Exhibits were received from both plaintiff and defendant. Having heard oral arguments, the Court took the matter under submission.

Judge: Suzanne Bolanos, Clerk: N. Regas, Not reported (602)
